site.name: StateSwap
site.tagline: The Student Marketplace for Penn State
site.description: Buy, sell, and offer services on campus — the smarter way.

hero.headline: The Marketplace Built for Campus Life
hero.subheadline: Buy, sell, and offer services between students — faster, smarter, and more campus-native than anything else out there.

howItWorks.headline: Up and running in minutes
howItWorks.subheadline: Whether you're buying, selling, or building a campus business — StateSwap makes it effortless.

steps.title: Create Your Profile
steps.description: Sign up with your Penn State email. Verified students only — so you know exactly who you're dealing with.

steps.title: List Items or Services
steps.description: Post what you're selling or the services you offer. Photos, prices, availability — all in under 2 minutes.

steps.title: Connect & Transact
steps.description: Match with buyers or clients on campus. Message, meet, and complete the deal safely within the community.

categories.headline: Items & Services, One Platform
categories.subheadline: From textbooks to tutoring — StateSwap handles both sides of campus commerce.

items.title: Buy & Sell Items
items.description: Textbooks, furniture, electronics, clothing, dorm gear — everything a Penn Stater needs at Penn State prices.

services.title: Offer Services
services.description: Turn your skills into income. Offer tutoring, photography, design, food delivery, and more to your campus community.

whyStateSwap.headline: Built different. Built for you.
whyStateSwap.subheadline: Not just another Craigslist. StateSwap is designed from the ground up for the campus experience.

cards.title: Verified Students Only
cards.description: Every user is a verified Penn State student. No randoms, no scammers — just your campus community.

cards.title: Clean, Modern Experience
cards.description: A marketplace that actually looks good. No clutter, no spam posts — just clean listings and fast discovery.

cards.title: Services Are First-Class
cards.description: Unlike eBay or Facebook Marketplace, services are a core feature — not an afterthought.

cards.title: Early Community Perks
cards.description: Founding members get lifetime priority placement, free promotions, and early access to every new feature we ship.

forEntrepreneurs.headline: Turn Your Skill Into a Campus Business
forEntrepreneurs.subheadline: StateSwap gives ambitious Penn State students the platform to launch, grow, and monetize their services — before graduation.

launchTimeline.headline: Coming Soon to Penn State
launchTimeline.subheadline: We're building something big. Here's where we are.

milestones.label: Multi-Campus
milestones.description: Expanding to more Big Ten schools

joinEarly.headline: Be First. Get the Edge.
joinEarly.subheadline: Join the waitlist and lock in your founding member status before we launch.

fields.name: Full Name
fields.services: What would you sell or offer? (optional)

joinEarly.successMessage: You're on the list! We'll reach out before launch.

footer.tagline: The student marketplace for Penn State.
